titleStmt.title: SII 7.458: original edition by K.V. Subrahmanya Aiyer
No. 458. (A.R. No. 244 of 1901). ON THE WEST WALL OF THE SAME MANDAPA.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī . pūmaruviya tirumātum puvimātum ceyamātum nāmaruviya kalaimātum pukaḻ
mātum nayan tu pulka Arumaṟaiviti neṟiyaṉaittu n=ta ḻaippa varumuṟai yurimaiyil maṇimuṭi
cūṭit tiṅkaḷveṇkuṭait ticaikkaḷu ṟeṭṭu n=ta ṅku tanikkūṭa n=tāne na viḷaṅkak karuṅkalippaṭṭiyai
c ceṅkol turappa porukati rāḻi puvi vaḷart tuṭanvara villava riraṭṭar minavar ceralar pallavar nu
taliyar pāttivar paṇiya Eṇṇaruṅ kaṟpakam maṇṇa kam puṇarn tu cempon virasiṁ hā- sana ttup puva
namuḻutuṭaiyāḷoṭum vīṟṟirun=ta ruḷiya kopparakesaripanma rāna tiripuvanaccakkaravattikaḷ śrīrājarā
jade vaṟku yāṇṭu patineṭṭāvatu jayaṅkoṇṭacoḻamaṇṭalattuk kaḷattūrkkoṭṭattut taniyū
r śrīmaturān=ta kaccaturvve timaṅkalattut tiruvacciṟupākkattu Āḷuṭaiyanāyanār Āṭcikoṇṭā
ṟku ceṅkeṇikaḷil Irājanārāyaṇaccampuvarāyanen Innāyanāṟkut tiruman=ti raponakattatukku ti
ruvacciṟupākkattu pāṭikāvaluḷḷutu patineṭṭāvatu mutal can=ti rātittavarai Āṭcikoṇṭanāyanāṟ
kut tiruman=ti raponakattukku Amutupaṭiyākak kuṭutten ceṅkeṇi rājanārāyaṇaccampuvarāyanen I
tu panmā heśvara rakṣai . Ivai pallavan Eḻuttu .
Digital edition of SII 7.458 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Dorotea Operato.
